reauth_confirm.title: [%key:common::config_flow::title::reauth%]
reauth_confirm.description: Alarm.com needs to re-authenticate your account.

otp_submit.title: Enter One-Time Password
otp_submit.description: If you used the SMS or email authentication methods, an OTP has already been sent to your inbox.

abort.must_enable_2fa: Two-factor authentication must be enabled in order to log in with this provider.

data_description.arm_code: Sets the code to use when arming the alarm and unlocking locks via Home Assistant. To remove the code, check the box below.
data_description.remove_arm_code: When set, the code will be removed from the locks and alarm.

modes.title: Arming Mode Profiles
modes.description: Set arming behavior for each arming mode.

data_description.arm_night_options: Arm Night may not be available on all partitions.

resource_id.name: Resource ID
resource_id.description: Alarm.com resource ID for the sensor to bypass. Find this in the 'resource_id' attribute on the sensor's entity.

partition_id.name: Partition ID
partition_id.description: Optional Alarm.com partition resource ID. If omitted, the first partition on the same system is used.

unbypass_sensor.name: Unbypass sensor
unbypass_sensor.description: Remove bypass from a supported Alarm.com sensor.

resource_id.name: Resource ID
resource_id.description: Alarm.com resource ID for the sensor to unbypass.

partition_id.name: Partition ID
partition_id.description: Optional Alarm.com partition resource ID. If omitted, the first partition on the same system is used.

set_auto_off.name: Set auto-off timer
set_auto_off.description: Schedule one or more Alarm.com lights to turn off after a duration.

duration.name: Duration
duration.description: How long to wait before turning the light off.

cancel_auto_off.name: Cancel auto-off timer
cancel_auto_off.description: Cancel a pending auto-off timer for one or more Alarm.com lights.
